subject: refactor(styling): move font, color, and layout inline styles to className
body:
Convert inline style objects to Tailwind className utilities where the
properties have direct equivalents. Eliminates redundant style props and
reduces the useTheme()/colors dependency footprint.

Key changes:
- Font styles: fontSize/fontWeight/letterSpacing → text-xl, font-bold,
  tracking-tight, text-[28px], etc.
- Theme colors: style={{ color: colors.primary }} → text-primary,
  style={{ backgroundColor: colors.base200 }} → bg-base-200
- Layout: flex/padding/margin/minHeight/width/overflow → flex-1, px-3,
  py-2.5, min-h-8, w-[280px], overflow-hidden
- Conditional colors: ternary style objects → conditional className strings
- Removed redundant style={{ color: colors.baseContent }} where className
  already had text-base-content (ChatHeaderMenu)

Import cleanup:
- ToneEditModal: removed useTheme + withAlpha (fully className-based now)
- MessageInfoModal: removed useTheme (fully className-based now)
- DesktopLayout.DesktopLayout: removed unused useTheme

Files: home.tsx, DesktopLayout, ComposeBar, ToneSelector, ChatListItem,
InstallInstructionsModal, ToneEditModal, MessageInfoModal, ChatHeaderMenu,
BubbleContent

Net reduction: -112 lines across 10 files.

Tags: styling, tailwind, code-quality, cleanup

Urgency: 2
